problem: Metric typography is connected and visually reviewed with warnings. Metric unit and label need normalization review before any future CSS adjustment or promotion review.

plannedReview: Preserve value as the hierarchy anchor for MetricCard.
Check whether source-sized value typography overwhelms card density in SummaryDashboard.
Compare extreme value and localized label pressure before any CSS adjustment.
Review unit scale against metric value without merging semantic roles.
Check whether unit and label can share primitive characteristics while keeping separate semantic tokens.
Evaluate whether unit typography overfits the captured dashboard source.
Review long localized labels against MetricCard density.
Check whether label typography can align with unit primitive behavior without losing role clarity.
Keep label semantics distinct from caption because caption remains blocked.
